overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's bustling commercial district. The player character moves along sidewalks past vibrant neon signage, construction barriers, and futuristic vehicles under bright midday sun, transitioning from sunlit open streets to shaded covered walkways and back to open intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit commercial street with construction barriers

events.description: futuristic green car drives past on the right side of the street
silver sedan drives past followed by a red vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past yellow construction barriers on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic green car driving past the camera on the street
pedestrian walking in opposite direction passing the camera

entered.detail: temporary yellow barriers lining the left side of the sidewalk
large blue billboard with red star logo and asian text
orange metal scaffolding structure on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunlit commercial street with the camera moving forward along a concrete sidewalk. Yellow construction barriers line the left side while a large Cirrsus Cola billboard dominates the right. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the street as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded walkway under building awnings with red lanterns

events.description: entering shaded area under building awnings, sunlight diminishes significantly
construction worker in orange helmet briefly blocks the view while walking past

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the covered walkway past storefronts

notable_agents.action: construction worker in orange hard hat and safety vest walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: traditional red asian paper lanterns hanging under building awnings
overhead building awnings creating shade over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a shaded walkway under building awnings, with the lighting shifting from bright sun to mixed shade. Red paper lanterns hang overhead on the left, and a construction worker in an orange hard hat passes by. The construction barriers and large billboard from the previous segment fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon signs approaching intersection

events.description: approaching open intersection with visible steam vents rising from the street
steam vents become prominent in the distance as camera approaches intersection

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection with steam rising ahead in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction toward the intersection

entered.detail: cyan neon arrow sign reading Barely Illegal pointing left
white steam venting from grates in the street ahead
curved elevated highway structure with green safety barriers

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the covered walkway, a prominent cyan neon sign reading Barely Illegal appears on the left. The camera approaches an open intersection where steam vents are visible in the distance, and an elevated highway ramp structure becomes visible on the right. The red paper lanterns move closer as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with steam vents and elevated highway

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection with active steam vents
turning right at the corner around the rounded building

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection and turning right at the corner around the building

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing on the street corner conversing

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
rounded corner building with closed metal security grates and red lanterns

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection with steam rising from street vents. The elevated highway ramp looms larger on the right, and a graffiti-covered wall becomes visible. After passing a group of pedestrians standing on the corner, the camera turns right around a rounded building with closed storefront grates.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with closed storefronts and red lanterns

events.description: entering narrower enclosed sidewalk with overhead awnings and closed shops

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk past closed storefronts with metal grates

entered.detail: metal security grate covering closed storefront with red paper lanterns above
narrow alley opening between buildings ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along a narrow enclosed sidewalk with closed storefronts protected by metal security grates. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, and the elevated highway and graffiti wall from the previous segment disappear from view as the camera proceeds toward a narrow alley entrance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a bustling commercial street that transitions from a bright, open sidewalk into a shaded urban walkway. It begins under a brilliant midday sun, gliding past yellow construction barriers and a towering Cirrus Cola billboard while futuristic vehicles and pedestrians flow through the sunlit corridor. As the camera advances, the environment shifts from the open street into the cool shadow of building awnings, causing the lighting to transition from harsh brightness to mixed shade. The scene then opens up to reveal red paper lanterns hanging overhead and a construction worker in an orange hard hat passing by, as the previous billboards and barriers recede into the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded commercial walkway into a wide urban intersection before narrowing into a secluded side street. It begins under a covered path where a cyan Barely Illegal neon sign glows on the left, moving toward an open intersection marked by distant steam vents and a looming elevated highway ramp. As the camera emerges into the bright open air, it passes rising steam and a graffiti-covered wall, gliding past a group of pedestrians before turning right around a rounded building with closed storefront grates. The scene then shifts into a narrow enclosed sidewalk where red paper lanterns hang overhead and the highway structure disappears from view. Finally, the camera proceeds past a series of metal security grates toward the entrance of a narrow alley.
